import React from 'react'; import './Experience.css'; const Experience = () => { const experiences = [ { id: 1, title: "AI/ML Engineer", company: "TechCorp Solutions", period: "2023 - Present", description: "Leading machine learning initiatives and developing AI solutions for enterprise applications. Implementing computer vision, NLP, and predictive analytics solutions.", technologies: ["Python", "TensorFlow", "PyTorch", "AWS", "Docker", "Kubernetes"] }, { id: 2, title: "Full-Stack Developer", company: "InnovateStart", period: "2022 - 2023", description: "Built scalable web applications using modern technologies and best practices. Collaborated with cross-functional teams to deliver high-quality products.", technologies: ["React", "Node.js", "MongoDB", "Express", "TypeScript", "PostgreSQL"] }, { id: 3, title: "Frontend Developer", company: "Digital Dynamics", period: "2021 - 2022", description: "Created responsive and interactive user interfaces for various client projects. Focused on performance optimization and user experience.", technologies: ["React", "JavaScript", "CSS3", "HTML5", "Git", "Webpack"] } ]; return (

Professional Experience

My professional journey and the valuable experiences that have shaped my expertise in AI/ML and full-stack development.

{experiences.map((exp, index) => (

{exp.title}

{exp.company}
{exp.period}

{exp.description}

{exp.technologies.map((tech, techIndex) => ( {tech} ))}
))}

); }; export default Experience;
